## Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck sup.sh` passes with no warnings
- [ ] New tool follows the 3-piece pattern (add_step + check_ + update_)
- [ ] Tested on at least one platform (macOS / Linux)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
